response:
Subject: Appeal to Unblock My Account  

I am writing to appeal on behalf of [Your Name] to request the unblocking of my account. The account was blocked due to suspicious payment activity, which I did not initiate. I believe the action was unjustified and wish to clarify that the payments in question were made by mistake. I am prepared to provide additional information to resolve this matter. Thank you for your attention.  

[Your Name]  
[Your Contact Information]
